creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text: After a lot more testing, I'm not sure what caused the issue I saw in ^.  Right now it seems stable.  I upgraded a high volume production HBase/OpenTSDB cluster and it looks good, so far better write performance and less CPU usage.  Will have to wait a day to see how GC performance is after the heap gets dirtied up a lot but so far looks like it's safe to use JDK8 everywhere.
